zh.Heversham, Westmorland, England: 英國維斯特莫藍德維沙安
zh.lifeSummary: 當Matthew III Redman於大約1291年出生在英國藍卡爾時，他的父親Matthew Redman42歲，母親Goditha de Camberton22歲。他於大約1359年5月與Margaret Ireby結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1360年在英國享年70歲，埋葬在英國維斯特莫藍德維沙安。

zh-hans.Levens, Westmorland, England: 英国維斯特莫藍德列文斯
zh-hans.Heversham, Westmorland, England: 英国維斯特莫藍德維沙安
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matthew III Redman于大约1291年出生在英国藍卡爾时，他的父亲Matthew Redman42岁，母亲Goditha de Camberton22岁。他于大约1359年5月与Margaret Ireby结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1360年在英国享年70岁，埋葬在英国維斯特莫藍德維沙安。

nameMeanings.name: Redman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English red (Old English hrēod) ‘reed’ + -man, presumably for a thatcher or reed-cutter. Compare Reeder .
English: in southeastern England sometimes a topographic name perhaps for someone who lived by a clearing, from Middle English rede (Old English rēod, rȳd) ‘clearing’ + man.
English: habitational name from Redmain (Cumberland), from Old English rēad ‘red’ + an uncertain second element, perhaps a dialect form of man ‘cairn’.

variants.name: Reeder
meanings: English: occupational name for someone who used reeds as a roofing material (a thatcher), a derivative of Middle English rede ‘reed’ + -er. Compare Reed and Redman .

English: topographic name for someone who lived by a clearing, a derivative of Middle English rede, ride, rude ‘clearing’ (see Reed ) + -er, synonymous and interchangeable with atte Rede, atte Rude ‘at the clearing’. This type of name, composed of a topographic term + -er, is common in Kent, Surrey and Sussex, and it is also found in Essex.
Dutch and German: variant of   Reder   3.

variants.name: Redhead
meanings: nickname for someone with red hair, from Middle English red ‘red’ + he(ve)d ‘head’. Compare Redman .
habitational name from an unidentified place in northern England called Redhead, probably meaning ‘red headland’.

variants.name: Rodman
meanings: English: occupational name for a thatcher or reed-cutter, from Southwest Middle English rod(e), rud(e) (Old English hrēod) ‘reed’ + -man. Synonymous with Redman 1.
English: topographic name for someone who lived at a clearing, from Middle English rode (Old English rodu) or Southwest Middle English rude (Old English rȳde) ‘clearing’ + man. See Redman 2.
Americanized form of German Rodmann: variant of Rodemann (see Rodeman ).

nameMeanings.name: Matthew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Matthew III Redman was born about 1291, in Lancashire, England, his father, Matthew Redman, was 42 and his mother, Goditha de Camberton, was 22. He married Margaret Ireby about May 1359. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1360, in England, at the age of 70, and was buried in Heversham, Westmorland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matthew III Redman est né environ 1291, à Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Matthew Redman, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Goditha de Camberton, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Ireby environ mai 1359. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1360, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Heversham, Westmorland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matthew III Redman um 1291 in Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Matthew Redman 42 und seine Mutter Goditha de Camberton 22. Er hat um Mai 1359 Margaret Ireby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1360 im Alter von 70 Jahren in England und wurde in Heversham, Westmorland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matthew III Redman è nato il circa 1291 nel Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Matthew Redman, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Goditha de Camberton, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Ireby circa maggio 1359. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1360, nel England, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Heversham, Westmorland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Matthew III Redmanが約1291年にイギリスランカシュアイアで生まれた時，父Matthew Redmanは42歳，母Goditha de Cambertonは22歳であった。約1359年5月にMargaret Irebyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1360年にイギリスで70歳で死去し，イギリスウエストモーランドヘバーシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Matthew III Redman(이)가 대략 1291년 영국 랭카실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Matthew Redman(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Goditha de Camberton(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1359년 5월 Margaret Ireby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1360년 영국에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨스트모를랜드 헤버샤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matthew III Redman nasceu aproximadamente 1291, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Matthew Redman, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Goditha de Camberton, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Ireby aproximadamente maio de 1359. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1360, em Inglaterra, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Heversham, Westmorland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matthew III Redman родился около 1291 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Matthew Redman было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Goditha de Camberton, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Ireby около май 1359 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1360 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности хивиршам, вестморланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matthew III Redman nació aproximadamente 1291, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Matthew Redman, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Goditha de Camberton, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Margaret Ireby aproximadamente mayo de 1359. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1360, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Heversham, Westmorland, Inglaterra.
